components.purpose: Work order queue: Expose exact transition ownership, preconditions, evidence, and canonical next-state consequences.
components.content_limits: Work order queue keeps stable IDs, scope, owner, effective time, and state consequences visible; labels use direct operational language and long evidence wraps without truncating identifiers.
components.accessibility_notes: Actions are keyboard reachable, announce owner and state consequence, and expose disabled reasons before activation.
components.responsive_behavior: Reflow with CSS layout at narrow widths; preserve semantic reading order, field-size controls, visible status text, and horizontally scroll only bounded evidence regions.
